boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: wrong asset work order.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source control record closes the boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect remains; do not escalate.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current asset ID and work package match

critical_features_preserved: current asset ID and work package match
final_answer: The packet’s controlling control record states the required dependency is current and exact: asset ID, work package, scope, date, and boundary all match. Policy allows execution only when source records close the exact boundary, and the communication note cannot override control records. The action may proceed.
